description: Codifies two design rules from FRAC-25 review: quotes → .text-subtitle (visual contrast via display font); asides/bylines/role labels → new .text-aside utility (italic Inter body voice). Andrew Rose + Jake Zegil anecdotes migrate from .text-body to .text-subtitle. Nietzsche pull quote drops dead 'italic' modifier. 7 italic-aside sites (Want a reduced rate, Andrew/Jake/Nietzsche bylines, event host CTA, bio role labels, P.S.) migrate to .text-aside.
title: Add .text-aside utility; migrate Campus quote passages to .text-subtitle and italic asides/bylines/P.S. to .text-aside
